summary: Round-1 finding #1 (weak output assertions in Test_app_doReport_procpidstat) addressed: regex pins the YYYY/MM/DD timestamp format and a pid-string check pins the data row independently of the query column. Round-1 finding #2 (+2 magic number) was a non-blocking optional and consciously deferred — see decisions log. Litmus checks unchanged from round 1; all 5/5 still verified. Test pyramid stays unit-heavy and consistent.

litmusChecks.production_line: report/report.go: data row emission in printStatSample for procpidstat

Test_app_doReport_procpidstat (regex `\d{4}/\d{2}/\d{2}` would fail on format change)
